page: Microsoft Azure DC48es_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEV6 server family. It is equipped with 48 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel processor. The instance features 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. It operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance persistent disks. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance. Additionally, this configuration does not include any graphics processing units.

Given its 48 dedicated vCPUs and 192.0 GB of RAM, the DC48es_v6 is classified within the memory-optimized category by the vendor, though its 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio also aligns with general-purpose resource distributions. It is designed for enterprise workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and substantial memory capacity, such as relational databases, memory-intensive analytics, and enterprise application hosting. The lack of local storage represents a tradeoff, shifting the cost-efficiency focus toward external storage performance and network-attached disk configurations.
description: The Microsoft Azure DC48es_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEV6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 192.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external storage volumes. With no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, network configurations must be managed externally. The DC48es_v6 is designed for workloads that require dedicated compute resources and a solid memory footprint, such as relational databases, enterprise application servers, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC48es_v6 is a DCEV6-family virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 192.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 48-vCPU virtual machine with 192 GB of RAM and Premium Storage capability for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
